example_quotes.quote: NO human assistance in support. only chatbot, doesn't matter whether your problem is resolved.
pathetic experience and very bad customer service. only bot is available and no customer care. this often happens when you already pay the amount for the service.
horrible service ...really incompetent customer service who can't understand simple things and complicate issues and waste time and money

themes.sentiment_note: Highly negative. Customers express extreme frustration with the lack of human support, reliance on chatbots, and the perceived incompetence of customer service agents, especially after payments are made.
themes.recommendation: Invest in scaling human customer support and improving agent training. Implement a clear escalation path from chatbot to human agent for complex or unresolved issues.

example_quotes.quote: I booked two massage packs and it was a nightmare to get the second one. They cancelled it twice and still haven't received it.
Nowadays Urban Company is not providing the services and and saying some excludes and cancelling the bookings... they cancelled directly without my confirmation.
I had booked insta help on this and finished payment... no one came at booked timings.

themes.sentiment_note: Strongly negative. Customers are losing time and money due to unfulfilled bookings, multiple cancellations, and unexpected delays without adequate communication or resolution.
themes.recommendation: Improve service provider availability and scheduling algorithms to prevent overbooking and unexpected cancellations. Implement robust communication protocols for any service changes, ensuring customer confirmation for rescheduling or cancellation.

example_quotes.quote: Their motto is Unprofessional services at outrageous price.

The technician visited, checked the refrigerator, and immediately said the sensor was faulty... When the Haier technician came, they found that the sensor was perfectly fine... This caused unnecessary confusion, wasted my time, and delayed the repair.
most worst experience ever they did not work they laughed and clicked unnecessary pictures

themes.sentiment_note: Extremely negative. Customers report technicians being careless, incompetent, dishonest, or having a disrespectful attitude, leading to incorrect diagnoses, incomplete work, or outright fraud.
themes.recommendation: Strengthen technician vetting and continuous training programs focusing on technical competence, professional conduct, and accurate diagnostics. Implement a feedback loop for service quality and hold providers accountable for reported issues.

example_quotes.quote: The spare parts are priced significantly higher than their actual market value, and the overall service charges are excessive. It feels like customers are being overcharged...
the rate card for replacement under the head double door showed price of 1700 and the technical and the customer care insisted that two doors means amount is 3400. cheats
Service inspection charges collected from me for laptop are 199/- (with taxes 258/-) ... on rejecting services they charged me 258/- rupees for doing nothing.

themes.sentiment_note: Highly negative. Customers feel exploited by high prices for parts and services, a lack of transparency in billing, and being charged for services not rendered or for rejecting expensive estimates.
themes.recommendation: Establish clear, upfront pricing for common services and parts. Require technicians to provide detailed, itemized quotes before starting any work and obtain customer approval for any changes. Review cancellation policies to ensure fairness and transparency regarding associated fees.

example_quotes.quote: They stopped the insta help facility in my area
UC insta help in 10min, but no slots are available for two' three days
Right now, they don't have helps available and still trying to prove this ad workable model.

themes.sentiment_note: Negative. Customers are frustrated by the unavailability of services in their area, or by misleading claims of quick service when no slots are actually available for extended periods.
themes.recommendation: Accurately communicate service availability in specific geographic areas and provide realistic estimates for service slot availability. Invest in expanding service coverage and increasing the number of active service providers to meet demand.

example_quotes.quote: worst App , I had booked insta help on this and finished payment. After that all ways the app shows" something went wrong " . I lost my money and time.
my ro machine is not working properly so I want warranty service from company but the urban company app is not responding with me.
not able to connect M2 pro

themes.sentiment_note: Negative. Customers report app malfunctions (e.g., 'something went wrong', unresponsiveness for warranty service) and connectivity issues with products.
themes.recommendation: Conduct thorough app testing and bug fixing. Improve integration between the app and integrated product services (like warranty claims) to ensure a seamless user experience. Provide clear troubleshooting guides for common connectivity issues.

long_tail: Customers reported misleading service information regarding service inclusions (e.g., no oil in Thai massage) and unclear scope of work (in-home vs. outside) (review_ids: [f18093c9-7c9a-451e-81ae-5ee50ade2020, 6fd57ca2-8ff2-4afd-bbbe-3195c0592739])

Issues related to payment options (missing cash-on-delivery), inaccurate orders (missing items), and problematic refund processes for incorrect deliveries (review_ids: [dd5384b0-06a8-4cda-9459-9fa369251dc4, 3af2e037-e2d6-400b-a0d6-73df71331315])

Instances of services failing to resolve the core problem (e.g., water purifier TDS issue not solved) and property damage occurring during service (e.g., AC damaged) (review_ids: [491ed315-4e78-4ac1-8b4a-ec41d56992a7, 18c278c-d09d-4f03-97ad-0b22e027c99c])
